estimation._note: Cross-port GLMM estimation defaults (single home). wald_se: 'rx' (fastmode: rx + Laplace) is the 1.1.0 default; 'hessian' is the accurate/AGQ opt-in. nagq: 1 = Laplace. Mirrors the contract's serde Default impls (WaldSe::default, default_nagq) — change together.

benchmarks._odds_note: beta. log(OR) for OR = 1.5 / 2.5 / 4.0 (Chen, Cohen & Chen 2010). Logit-outcome presets only; values are on the β (log-odds) wire scale.

text.required_n_ci_footnote: Required N from the model-based crossing fit (isotonic); CI by Wilson band inversion, rounded outward.
text.required_n_ci_footnote_appr: appr. = probit extrapolation beyond the search range — rerun with a higher `to` to confirm.
text.required_n_ci_footnote_suppressed: — = fit suppressed ({labels}: non-monotone within the grid).
text.required_n_ci_footnote_floor: ≤ = target reached at or below the search floor — rerun with a lower `from` to localise.
text.non_monotone_warning: ⚠ {label}: power not monotone in N (max drop {drop} > MC noise); model-based fit suppressed — grid value shown.
